{"query":"2026 Super Bowl halftime show performer surprise guests Trump reaction Bad Bunny Super Bowl LX","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1336,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.cnn.com/2026/02/09/us/video/trump-truth-social-bad-bunny-super-bowl-halftime-show-vrtc","title":"Trump reacts to Bad Bunny Super Bowl halftime show | CNN","content":"The Centers for Disease Control has linked more than 1,600 cases of cyclospora across five states to Taco Bell."},{"url":"https://abcnews.com/US/trump-calls-bad-bunnys-super-bowl-halftime-show/story?id=129980124","title":"Trump calls Bad Bunny's Super Bowl halftime show a 'slap in the face to our country' - ABC News","content":"Puerto Rican artist Bad Bunny has faced a wave of conservative backlash since he was announced as the Super Bowl performer last year.
The Grammy-winning artist brought his Puerto Rican culture to the stage at Levi Stadium in Santa Clara, California, playing a collection of his hit songs in a predominantly Spanish performance.
The show culminated with him showcasing the countries that make up the Americas, starting from the southern hemisphere with Chile to the northern hemisphere with Canada, and ending on Puerto Rico, Bad Bunny's birthplace.
At one point, Bad Bunny was seen paying homage to his recent success, handing a Grammy Award to a young boy on stage.
Lady Gaga joined Bad Bunny on the field, performing a Salsa-inspired version of her song "Die With a Smile," followed by a performance by Latin star Ricky Martin."},{"url":"https://people.com/super-bowl-2026-trump-lashes-out-bad-bunny-halftime-show-11902396","title":"Trump Lashes Out at Bad Bunny’s Super Bowl 2026 Halftime Show","content":"President Donald Trump took to his Truth Social account immediately following Bad Bunny's Apple Music Super Bowl LX Halftime Show to complain about the Puerto Rican rapper's performance.
"There is nothing inspirational about this mess of a Halftime Show and watch, it will get great reviews from the Fake News Media, because they haven’t got a clue of what is going on in the REAL WORLD — And, by the way, the NFL should immediately replace its ridiculous new Kickoff Rule.
Despite past statements against the Trump administration — including his decision not to bring his record-setting Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour to the U.S. for fear of ICE raids — Bad Bunny's halftime performance avoided blatant political statements, instead focusing on a message of love and unity.
See PEOPLE's coverage of the 2026 Super Bowl between the New England Patriots and the Seattle Seahawks, airing live on NBC on Sun., Feb."},{"url":"https://www.hollywoodreporter.com/music/music-news/trump-reacts-bad-bunny-2026-super-bowl-halftime-show-1236500142/","title":"Trump Calls Bad Bunny's Super Bowl Halftime Show 'Disgusting'","content":"While Bad Bunny was expressing love during his 2026 Super Bowl halftime show, Donald Trump decided to react with hate.
And to no surprise, as Trump has been outspoken about his disdain for the Grammy winner, he called it “absolutely terrible” and “disgusting.”
“The Super Bowl Halftime Show is absolutely terrible, one of the worst, EVER!
Most recently, Bad Bunny slammed ICE at the 2026 Grammys during his acceptance speech.
He also opted out of holding U.S. stops on his Debí Tirar Más Fotos World Tour due to worries of potential ICE raids at his concerts.
On Sunday, the Seattle Seahawks and the New England Patriots were battling it out inside Levi’s Stadium in Santa Clara, California, for Super Bowl LX, with the Seahawks ultimately taking home the Vince Lombardi Trophy."}]}

Bad Bunny's Super Bowl half-time show was one big love letter to his native Puerto Rico**,** culminating in a message of pride in his home and the Americas, and an appeal for unity with the US. The 14-minute set included guest performances from Lady Gaga and Ricky Martin, along with cameos from the likes of Pedro Pascal, Cardi B, Karol G and Jessica Alba, who could be seen dancing on the porch of his famous casita, a staple of his shows designed to look like a traditional Puerto Rican home.
